title: He Hired the Boss
writer: Ben Markson, Irving Cummings Jr., Peter B. Kyne
actors: Stuart Erwin, Evelyn Venable, Thurston Hall
plot: A bookkeeper who wants to marry the company's secretary, is strapped for cash, and gets fired after persuading the boss's son to elope with his sweetheart, ultimately uncovers a crime and discovers that he owns property worth $100...
